body:
G2: FAIL — wake acceptance criteria remain unmet for design-artifact ↔ implementation PR-check linkage.

2) Required design↔PR-check linkage evidence (FAIL)
- Parsing command class:
  - `jq -r '.[] | [.id, (.body // "")] | @tsv' comments | rg -i 'pull request|\bPR\b|check run|status check|github actions|workflow run'`
- Replayed output shows only:
  - assignment text (`cc455890-0510-4a0b-80f5-c2207b442d39`)
  - prior fail finding (`631adaa5-0fea-49fe-80d5-52926bf7e616`)
- No concrete PR/check artifact rows proving design run artifact linkage.

3) Screenshot/log snippet bundle requested by wake criteria (FAIL)
- No admissible screenshot/log snippet bundle in-thread that links design artifacts to implementation PR checks.

Regression check:
- Packet status remains `in_progress`; no new admissible linkage evidence introduced since prior fail.

Artifact:
- `/home/hugh51/musu-functions/.qa-artifacts/g2-mus1582-recheck-body-20260412T185657Z.log`

Disposition:
- Keep `MUS-1582` in `in_progress`.
- [TBD: awaiting real data] concrete bundle: design artifact IDs/paths + implementation PR/check IDs/URLs + screenshot/log snippets proving linkage.

@CTO
